info.title: Replate AI – REST API
info.description: Complete REST API for Replate AI, an AI-powered leftover recipe and grocery management application. All protected endpoints require a Firebase ID token supplied as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

tags.name: Grocery List
tags.description: Grocery lists derived from recipe ingredients

idToken.description: Firebase ID token (use as Bearer token)

post.summary: Sign in with email and password

200.description: Sign-in successful; returns Firebase ID token

post.description: Always returns 200 regardless of whether the email is registered, to prevent user enumeration.

200.description: Reset email sent (or silently ignored if email not found)

401.description: Session expired or refresh token invalid

post.summary: Create an aggregated grocery list from multiple recipes
post.description: Accepts an array of recipes with their ingredients. Ingredients with the same name and unit are merged into a single entry and their amounts are summed. The resulting consolidated list is stored in Firestore and returned.

post.summary: Create a grocery list from a single recipe's missing ingredients

get.summary: Get all grocery lists for the authenticated user
Get a specific grocery list by ID

patch.summary: Toggle isAvailableAtHome for a grocery item
patch.description: Items marked as available are excluded from the buy list but remain visible.

post.summary: Add a new item to an existing grocery list

delete.summary: Remove an item from a grocery list

patch.summary: Update the quantity of a grocery list item

post.description: Accepts a JPEG/PNG photo (max 5 MB), optionally uploads it to S3, and runs AI-based ingredient detection. Returns a list of detected ingredients with confidence scores.

image.description: Image file (JPEG or PNG, max 5 MB)

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's ingredient inventory

post.description: Creates an in-memory session from detected ingredients so the user can edit them before committing to inventory.

get.summary: Get the current state of a review session

patch.summary: Edit an ingredient name in a pending session

delete.summary: Remove an ingredient from a pending session

post.summary: Add a new ingredient to a pending session
Confirm session and save ingredients to inventory
post.description: Finalises the review session and writes all ingredients to Firestore. The session is destroyed afterwards.

patch.summary: Update quantity, unit, or expiry date of an inventory item

post.summary: Deduct ingredients after cooking a recipe
post.description: Called when the user marks a recipe as cooked. Reduces inventory quantities accordingly.

200.description: Inventory updated; returns deducted and skipped items

get.summary: AI-based user profile analysis from fridge contents
get.description: Analyses active inventory items to determine the user's cooking persona, diet type, and lifestyle.

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's profile and dietary preferences

patch.summary: Update profile fields and/or dietary preferences

post.summary: Save a recipe to the user's history
post.description: Silently skips if the recipe is already saved (dedup by recipeId).

get.summary: Get all saved recipes for the authenticated user
get.description: Returns recipes ordered by savedAt descending.

get.summary: Get the top 3 most popular recipes across all users

post.description: Generates personalised recipe suggestions based on provided ingredients and the authenticated user's dietary preferences. If no preferences are supplied in the request body, they are loaded automatically from the user's Firestore profile.

preferences.description: Optional dietary preferences (loaded from profile if omitted)

401.description: Unauthorized – invalid or missing Bearer token

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's application settings
